title: Create: Steampunk Ages
description: This modpack brings together the best Create mods, offering a unique experience of engineering and automation in Minecraft. Build complex machines, automate systems and transform your world into a steampunk paradise.
body:
Create: Steampunk Ages

![image1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50ecd85965a55dab8f044ec5af799a1038467e6a.jpeg)
<u>[Twitter / X](https://x.com/NanoSNAkeRs)</u> · <u>[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCiDBBh9Ndu_QJFBh_QfqlOg)</u>

**_NOTICE: As this is a Create mod focused pack and most of it's addons are still being updated, this will be experimental, many updates and changes will occur! Mods will be removed and added, so make sure to backup your worlds before updating!_**

This modpack brings together the best Create mods, offering a unique experience of engineering and automation in Minecraft. Build complex machines, automate systems and transform your world into a steampunk paradise.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WPnpxjmnXh8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


*All mods are the property of their respective owners, and a HUGE thanks to the mod creators, without whom this would not be possible!*
